## Validation

- [ ] Backend unit tests: `cd backend && mvn test`
- [ ] Backend integration tests: `cd backend && mvn verify`
- [ ] Frontend unit tests: `cd frontend && npm run test:unit`
- [ ] Frontend build: `cd frontend && npm run build`
- [ ] Cypress mocked E2E: `cd frontend && npm run test:e2e:cypress`
- [ ] Relevant documentation updated
